subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-22 in Vienna
subcodes.first_line: The distinction of humanity lies in spirituality and divine civilization, as well as their eternal peace and happiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: امتیاز انسان در روحانیت و مدنیت الهیه است در اطمینان و سُرور سرمدیست
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the human soul, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
